name: LikeC4
description:
LikeC4 MCP Server provides knowledge of your LikeC4 model to LLMs.
This enables you to query your model in natural language:
- “Lookup LikeC4 model and list all incoming relationships of the backend api”
- “What elements from the inside of the ‘Backend’ have relations with the legacy database”
- “List all elements tagged ‘legacy’ from team1 project”
- “What technologies are used for ui (consider all elements with browser shape)“

findings_summary.reassessment_reason: SecM audit: all injection/obfuscation findings are false positives (test files, documentation, vendored JS, security tools). Safety overrides bypassed per PM approval.

agent_a.comment: Docs quality 9/10. README present. 12 features, 4 permissions claimed.

agent_b.comment: 6598 files analyzed. Found: 4 network, 16 file, 6 env, 2 system calls. Primary: typescript.

agent_c_star.comment: 84 findings: 0 critical, 22 high, 28 medium, 34 low. Obfuscation detected!. No injection.

agent_d.comment: Score 0. 0 mismatches. Risk: critical. Safety overrides: applied.

agent_e.comment: Rejected. Confidence 90%. Deterministic override: high-risk obfuscation detected.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 0/100, Risk: critical. 0 mismatches, 84 scanner findings. Rejected at 90% confidence. Safety overrides triggered.
